/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PipeFluidEngine.dir/viewer/main_gui.cpp.o -o PipeFluidEngine  libpipe_fluid_core.a libpipe_fluid_render.a libpipe_fluid_imgui.a glfw_local/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo libpipe_fluid_core.a libpipe_fluid_sim_lib.a -framework CoreFoundation
